'''Trux Zissu''' was to be instated as governor on [[Delantine]] by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. He was accompanied by his son [[Stuart Zissu]], [[4B-X]], [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]], and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] from [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] in the ''[[Timespan]]''. While traveling, the ''Timespan'' was ambushed and boarded by [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]]. Trux shot the first two stormtroopers and surrendered in order to give the [[Droid/Legends|droids]] and Stuart time to escape in [[escape pod 4]].

Trux was described as muscular and fit, typical of a fighter, with silver hair.
